name: Toni Preckwinkle
bio: Toni Preckwinkle is the incumbent Cook County Board President and a candidate in the 2026 Democratic primary. She has led county government since 2010 after serving as a Chicago alderperson. (Source: Cook County race context and WTTW voter guide link in scout file: https://news.wttw.com/elections/voters-guide/2026-primary)
prior_office: Cook County Board President; Chicago Alderman (4th Ward)
